zh.lifeSummary: 當William Blake於1594年7月10日之前出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特時，他的父親William Blake32歲，母親Anne30歲。他於1617年9月23日與Agnes Thorne在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1663年10月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Blake was born before 10 July 1594, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Blake, was 32 and his mother, Anne, was 30. He married Agnes Thorne on 23 September 1617, in Pitminster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 October 1663, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé Agnes Thorne le 23 septembre 1617, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1663, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lui sposato Agnes Thorne il 23 settembre 1617, nel Pitminster, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: William Blake(이)가 1594년 7월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Blake(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1617년 9월 23일 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 Agnes Thorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1663년 10월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Blake nasceu antes 10 de julho de 1594, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Blake, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Thorne em 23 de setembro de 1617, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1663, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Blake родился перед 10 июля 1594 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Blake было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Thorne 23 сентября 1617 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1663 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
